description_long: This motorcycle features a rugged, industrial design with exposed mechanical components and a prominent suspension system. The body is clad in matte brown panels, giving it a utilitarian, almost post-apocalyptic appearance. The frame and engine are visible, with metallic pipes and springs running along the sides, and the wheels are fitted with thick, treaded tires suitable for urban or rough terrain. The handlebars are wide and equipped with round mirrors, while the seat is compact and streamlined. The overall build suggests durability and a focus on performance, with a low, aggressive stance. The color palette is dominated by brown, black, and metallic tones, contributing to its robust and functional aesthetic.
description: A rugged, industrial-style motorcycle with exposed mechanics, matte brown panels, and thick treaded tires. It has a compact seat, wide handlebars, and a robust, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide handlebars, round mirrors, and the prominent front tire with brown body panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed engine, suspension springs, metallic pipes, and brown side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the thick rear tire, dual exhausts, and the compact seat with visible frame elements.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the mechanical details, suspension, and brown bodywork.
